references.name: Linear
observedPatterns: Slim top navigation bar with horizontal tabs
Cool blue-gray color palette with minimal accent usage
Card-based project views with subtle elevation
Clean typography with DM Sans-like geometric sans-serif
adaptedElements: Top bar navigation pattern with horizontal view tabs
Card hover effect with subtle translateY lift
Muted status badges with tinted backgrounds

references.name: Notion
observedPatterns: Centered content containers with generous max-width
File tree navigation with expand/collapse toggles
Clean settings page with sidebar tab navigation
adaptedElements: Settings layout with left sidebar tabs

references.name: Vercel Dashboard
observedPatterns: Monochrome palette with single accent color
Thin border separators between content sections
Small, precise typography with tight scale
